title: Resolve prelude Contracts clash and refresh Diagnostics facade

source.subject: fix(corelib): resolve prelude Contracts clash and refresh Diagnostics facade

body:
Resolves a prelude `Contracts` name clash and refreshes the Diagnostics facade so Tier0 prelude imports compose cleanly.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `corelib`
- **Commit:** [`4b4cd74`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_standard/commit/4b4cd74)
- **Subject:** fix(corelib): resolve prelude Contracts clash and refresh Diagnostics facade
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23
